note: Assumptions used by the interactive tools. These are deliberately simple and visible. The budget simulator and translators are educational models, not forecasts.

budgetSimulator.disclaimer: A simplified educational model. It applies static, first-round effects only and does not model how the economy responds to changes. It is not a forecast and must not be read as one.

spendingRange.note: Each spending slider runs from half to one-and-a-half times today's figure.

budgetSimulator.taxNote: Each percentage point on a rate is worth roughly the amount shown (an HMRC 'ready reckoner' style estimate). Income tax shows the basic rate as a simple stand-in for the whole system.

projection.note: Debt in future years is the running total of borrowing plus assumed interest, held to zero once cleared. Economic growth, behavioural responses, and inflation are not modelled.
